prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger** (engine code: **CZGB 2.0L TFSI**) with a **custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust system** by **Milltek Sport**, featuring 76mm mandrel-bent piping and a **valved rear silencer** for optimized spool and backpressure reduction, paired with a **Forge Motorsport recirculating diverter valve (FDV-001)** to prevent boost leaks under aggressive shifts.

Installation of a **Motec M150 ECU** with **custom 2.5-bar MAP sensor** and **flex-fuel ethanol sensor (Continental 5WK96625)**, enabling **380+ WHP** on E85 with **1.5-bar peak boost**, supported by a **Pectel SQ6M standalone dash** for real-time data logging and **APR Stage 3+ software** with **anti-lag and launch control** mapped specifically for the **CZGB’s direct-injection system**.

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ engine build** including **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Pauter billet steel connecting rods**, **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs**, **Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves (1mm oversized)**, and a **custom ported cylinder head** by **Schmidt Motorsport**, paired with a **Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential (40% lock)** and **034 Motorsport transmission mounts** to handle the increased torque.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Widebody Kit (S1-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear) and **dual-canard front bumper** for aggressive aero, paired with a **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser** by **Audi Sport Customer Racing** for improved downforce at high speeds.

**OEM+ Euro-spec LED headlights (Audi Part # 8X0941007F/8X0941008F)** with **Lux H8 V4 LED bulbs** and **custom Morimoto HID projectors**, complemented by a **full carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF-8X0823100-01)** with **functional NACA ducts** for brake cooling, and **custom matte vinyl wrap (3M 1080 Gloss Black)** with **red pinstriping** by **Vinyl Frog**.

**Recaro Sportster CS (Audi Sport Edition) front seats** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, **custom rear seat delete** with **aluminum floor panel (034 Motorsport)**, and **full Alcantara interior (dashboard, door cards, headliner)** by **Euro Design USA**, featuring **red contrast stitching** and **custom S1 embroidery on the headrests**.
